linkrunner-key.description: Linkrunner API key, sent as the linkrunner-key request header. Never logged.

base_url.description: Linkrunner Data API base URL override for tests or proxies.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

filter.description: Optional campaigns stream filter passed through as-is.

channel.description: Optional campaigns stream channel filter passed through as-is.

display_id.description: Campaign display_id to scope the attributed_users stream. Required when reading attributed_users.

start_timestamp.description: Optional attributed_users stream lower-bound timestamp filter.

end_timestamp.description: Optional attributed_users stream upper-bound timestamp filter.

timezone.description: Optional attributed_users stream timezone for timestamp filters.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
